title: Container checkpoint fails with --ipc=host
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

Also, there is a running list of known issues in the [Podman Troubleshooting Guide](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/troubleshooting.md),
please reference that page before opening a new issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

Container checkpoint fails when then the container is running with `--ipc=host`

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. `sudo podman run --ipc=host --name some-postgres -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=mysecretpassword -d postgres`

2. `sudo podman container checkpoint some-postgres`

**Describe the results you received:**
Podman error message:
> CRIU checkpointing failed -52.  Please check CRIU logfile /var/lib/containers/storage/overlay-containers/4a405bbbc2e82f05e96f7a958bb552f125dde64544e5e85d7a7a8569a03de502/userdata/dump.log

CRIU error message:
> Error (criu/cr-dump.c:433): Task 39540 with SysVIPC shmem map @7f385035d000 doesn't live in IPC ns
Error (criu/cr-dump.c:1431): Dump mappings (pid: 39540) failed with -1

[dump.log](https://github.com/containers/podman/files/7526701/dump.log.txt)


**Describe the results you expected:**

Successful container checkpoint.

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
sudo podman version
Version:      4.0.0-dev
API Version:  4.0.0-dev
Go Version:   go1.17.3
Git Commit:   92da8682b3977a6ef57a6f73dde2f2aef6186d19
Built:        Fri Nov 12 09:47:37 2021
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**


comments.body:
`Version:      4.0.0-dev`

Where did you get this Podman build? We shouldn't be shipping a 4.0.0-dev anywhere.

Regardless, I recall us fixing this upstream recently - please try v3.4.2

@mheon I build Podman from source.

> Regardless, I recall us fixing this upstream recently - please try v3.4.2

Yes, there is a related PR (https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/12088), but this is a different problem.

It fails because CRIU doesn't currently support this use case:
https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/criu/blob/688149930abd96fd9e1db4ee3b67c727bab4f3d8/criu/cr-dump.c#L433

We discussed this with @adrianreber last week.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

> @adrianreber Any movement on this?

I think @rst0git showed me a proof of concept a couple of days ago. He is still working on it and there should be a corresponding PR "soon".

@adrianreber This is a different issue. CRIU doesn't support checkpoint/restore of sysvipc mapping in external IPC namespace (https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/criu/commit/75d8b81fd17c43370ce2fb5eacb6cf608b2a7b98).

I will close this issue as it is a problem with CRIU not Podman.
